corrections.note: Printed text reads ἐλεγμὸν, not ἔλεγχον.

corrections.current: οὐ παιδευθήσεται ὃς οὐκ ἔστιν πανοῦργος·
corrections.correct: οὐ παιδευθήσεται ὃς οὐκ ἔστιν πανοῦργος·
corrections.note: No change to wording; transcript correctly has middle dot. Included? no actual correction needed.

corrections.current: και κακων πληθος Bᵛ Ba?c? mg
corrections.correct: και κακων πληθος Bᵛ Ba?c? mg
corrections.note: Unclear superscript formatting in B entry; leaving uncertain.
Latin t was used for Greek tau in the apparatus transcription.
Apparatus lemma is printed ελεγμον, with variant ελεγχον A; transcript reversed lemma and variant.
Nomina sacra overline is present over θ.
Printed apparatus has accented Greek form ὀλισθάνει.
Printed parenthetical note includes ἐννοήματος, not νοηματος.
Apparatus lemma is πικρίαν, not πικρια.

uncertain.location: BODY verse 12-15 line numbering and section mark
uncertain.note: The left-margin line numbers and the § C marker are present; transcript seems to capture them, but exact spacing/placement is layout-dependent.
The B and Ba marginal sigla after 'και κακων πληθος' are hard to parse precisely from the scan; transcription may have superscript/detail issues beyond plain text.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct, but verse 7 has ἐλεγμὸν not ἔλεγχον. Apparatus has several real errors, including reversed lemma/variant at XXI 6, missing nomen sacrum overline, and misread forms στυππείον / ἐννοήματος / πικρίαν. Page number 685 is correct and not reviewed as body text.
